vibe: Clean, calm, premium, trustworthy. An investor-demo ready B2B SaaS for Indian MSMEs.

typography.installation: Ensure Outfit and Manrope are imported via Google Fonts in index.css

spacing_and_layout.general: Use generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards.
spacing_and_layout.topbar: h-16 border-b border-gray-200 bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl sticky top-0 z-40

surfaces_and_components.cards: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#0A3B2C] text-white hover:bg-[#072A1F] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

surfaces_and_components.badges: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border
surfaces_and_components.inputs: bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-900 rounded-lg focus:ring-[#0A3B2C] focus:border-[#0A3B2C] block w-full p-2.5

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle transform translate-y-[-2px] and shadow elevation for interactive cards
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use skeleton loaders (animate-pulse) with bg-gray-200 for charts and lists before data loads.

data_formatting.currency: Always format money as Indian Rupees. Example: const formatINR = (amount) => new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }).format(amount);

icons.style: Use uniform stroke-width (1.5 or 2). Ensure icons match the text color of the parent container or have semantic coloring (e.g., green check, red alert).

image_urls.description: Confident Indian businessman in blue suit holding papers
Close-up of monitor displaying financial graphs

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid="invoice-submit-button").
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not use light gray text on white backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use purple, violet, or generic bright blue.
Do NOT use default Inter/Roboto fonts. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text.
Implement the Dashboard with Shadcn UI components but override the default rounding and border colors to match this file.
Ensure all monetary values use Indian Rupee (INR) format (e.g., ₹1,25,000) using the Intl.NumberFormat API.
The Risk/Status badges must use the semantic colors defined (emerald, amber, orange, red).
For the Landing Page, create a premium, clean, high-contrast look using generous padding, bento grids, and the provided images.
Implement a smooth sidebar + topbar layout for the post-login experience.
